sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ أَحْمَدُ إِلَى مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ جَدِيدَةٍ صَبَاحَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je jutros otišao na razgovor za novi posao.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmad went to a new job interview this morning.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَرْتَدِي مَلَابِسَ رَسْمِيَّةً وَيَبْدُو وَاثِقًا مِنْ نَفْسِهِ.
sentences.translation: Nosio je formalnu odjeću i izgledao je samouvjereno.
sentences.translationEn: He was wearing formal clothes and looked confident.

sentences.arabic: أَجَابَ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِهُدُوءٍ وَشَرَحَ خِبْرَاتِهِ السَّابِقَةَ.
sentences.translation: Smireno je odgovarao na pitanja i objasnio svoja prethodna iskustva.
sentences.translationEn: He answered the questions calmly and explained his previous experiences.
